message:
fix(mobile): prevent canvas from capturing control deck touch events

Fixes mobile UX issue where the sequence canvas extended under the fixed
tab bar, intercepting touch events meant for navigation buttons.

SequenceView.tsx:
- Calculate mobile tab bar height including safe-area-inset-bottom
- Reduce canvas height in portrait (78vh → 65vh minus tab bar)
- Reduce canvas height in landscape (100vh-120px → 85vh minus tab bar)
- Prevents canvas from overlapping the control deck touch area

control-deck.css:
- Increase z-index to calc(var(--z-modal) + 100) to be above all content
- Add pointer-events: auto and touch-action: manipulation
- Button tweaks: pointer-events: auto !important, user-select: none

mobile-ux.css:
- Remove static touch-action from .sequence-grid-canvas
- Add comment explaining touch-action is set dynamically in JS
- Prevents CSS from overriding the inline style control

These changes ensure users can reliably tap the bottom navigation
on mobile devices without the canvas intercepting their touches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
